name: chat-short
prompt: Explain in plain language how tensor parallelism differs from data parallelism for LLM inference.

name: coding-medium
prompt: Write a Python function that groups GPU inventory entries by model name and memory size, then returns the largest homogeneous pool. Include type hints and a short docstring.

name: rag-style
prompt: Summarize the tradeoffs between smaller context windows with lower latency and larger context windows with higher memory pressure in a local inference server.
